User.title: User
User.description: A user of the AppTest Hub community

uid.description: The unique ID of the user

name.description: The display name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

credits.description: The number of credits the user has

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture

id.description: The unique ID of the app

developerId.description: The UID of the developer who submitted the app

iconUrl.description: The URL of the app's icon

playStoreLink.description: The link to the app on the Play Store

credits.description: The number of credits awarded for testing this app

testersRequired.description: The total number of testers needed

testersJoined.description: The number of testers who have joined

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the app was submitted

testingTime.description: The number of days required for testing

Test.title: Test
Test.description: A record of a user testing an app

id.description: The unique ID of the test record

userId.description: The UID of the user testing the app

appId.description: The ID of the app being tested

startDate.description: The timestamp when the test started

completed.description: Whether the test has been completed

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the test was completed

feedback.description: The feedback provided by the tester
